name: Saxon AI
description: Saxon is a data and analytics company that specializes in modernizing data warehouses through their proven migration methodology and tools. They support organizations in their digital transformation journey, helping them become more insights-driven and solve business challenges effectively.

name: Snowflake
description: Snowflake is a service provider that offers robust data warehousing solutions as part of its Data Cloud platform, enabling organizations to effectively mobilize and analyze their data. With its ability to unite siloed data and support diverse analytic workloads, Snowflake empowers businesses to gain insights and leverage data-driven opportunities.

name: GlowByte Consulting
description: GlowByte Consulting specializes in data warehousing and business intelligence solutions, offering expertise in data integration and analytical applications. Their commitment to high-quality services and collaboration with leading software vendors positions them as a key player in delivering tailored data solutions across various industries.

name: Data-Warehouse GmbH
description: Data-Warehouse GmbH (DWH) specializes in data management, offering key products like IQIMS, which enhances transparent and traceable data storage. Their expertise in holistic information management and compliance underscores their commitment to advanced data protection solutions.

name: 2nd Watch
description: 2nd Watch emphasizes the importance of data warehousing as a foundational element for a successful business intelligence platform. Their expertise in cloud solutions and data engineering positions them well to support enterprises in building modern data ecosystems for enhanced analytics and operational efficiency.

name: Amazon Web Services UK
description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) offers a robust infrastructure platform that supports data warehousing solutions, enabling organizations to enhance their data management and analytics capabilities. With a focus on scalability and reliability, AWS empowers businesses to optimize their operational efficiency through effective cloud transformation.

name: Dataware Tech
description: Dataware positions itself as a trusted partner in data analytics, offering services that turn data into actionable reports and leverage advanced AI for strategic insights, which are essential for effective data warehousing and informed decision-making.

name: Tableau
description: Tableau is a software publisher that specializes in data analysis and visualization, providing advanced analytics solutions that help organizations explore and visualize large datasets. Notably, Dwolla, a payment processing company, utilizes Tableau alongside AWS to enhance their data infrastructure, streamline insights, and eliminate data silos, ultimately enabling them to make data-driven decisions more efficiently.

name: Impetus Technologies
description: Impetus Technologies specializes in data warehouse modernization, offering expert services that enhance organizational efficiency through scalable and reliable data workflows. Their solutions, including LeapLogic, automate the transformation of legacy data warehouses to cloud-native architectures, supporting enterprises in their digital transformation efforts.

name: Databank IMX
description: DataBank, a Kyocera Group Company, offers a data warehouse solution that serves as a centralized point to normalize and activate data from multiple sources and systems. This capability is designed to enhance data processing, boost productivity, and improve decision-making for clients across various sectors.
